allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\david" -Force | Select-Object Name, Mode, LastWriteTime, @{Name="SizeMB";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"DIR"}else{[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}} | Sort-Object Mode, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)
